# expected-counts.txt — ranges for the regression test.
#
# Format: fixture   min_gadgets   max_gadgets
#
# The range is a sanity-net ("did shrike emit anything plausible")
# rather than a bit-for-bit gadget-count freeze. Toolchain
# updates (gcc 13 -> 14, binutils N -> N+1, glibc static linkage
# policy) routinely shift the count by tens of percent, so the
# ranges are deliberately wide. If shrike regresses to emitting
# zero gadgets on a real binary, we catch that. If shrike grows
# semantic-dedup or loses a class of terminators, a 10x swing
# shows up and we catch that too.

hello_x86_64    1    10000
hello_aarch64   1    10000
hello_riscv64   1    10000
hello_pe.exe    1    10000
